meta.description: Evaluator configuration — read-only, agent must not modify
meta.notes: ATR-scaled scoring makes thresholds portable across volatility regimes

outcome_classes.confirmed: price moved >= confirmation_atr_mult * ATR in predicted direction within horizon
outcome_classes.invalidated: price moved >= invalidation_atr_mult * ATR against predicted direction within horizon
